subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Recognize the importance of kindness and empathy
Identify the characters and main events in the poem
Understand how helping others improves society
Learn basic poetic devices used in the poem
Develop reading comprehension and vocabulary skills

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Kindness and Helping Others
student_activities: Recall a time when they helped someone
Write two words describing their feelings

lesson_plan.title: Understanding the Situation
topics_covered: Behaviour of the group of boys
student_activities: Identify phrases describing the old woman
Discuss why the other boys ignored her

lesson_plan.title: The Boy’s Kind Act
topics_covered: The boy helping the old woman
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of the main event
student_activities: Role-play the scene of helping the old woman
Explain why the boy helped her

lesson_plan.title: Message of the Poem
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of the poem’s theme
student_activities: Write the moral of the poem

lesson_plan.title: Language and Revision Activities
topics_covered: Poetic devices such as simile and alliteration
student_activities: Identify poetic devices from the poem

teacher_tip: Encourage students to discuss how small acts of kindness can make a big difference. Ask them to share examples from their daily lives to help them connect with the poem’s message.
